methodology.test: Mann-Whitney U (two-sided, tie-corrected, normal approximation with continuity correction)
methodology.rationale: Impression counts are heavily right-skewed; rank-based tests are robust to that shape. Cliff's delta floor of 0.20 excludes tiny-but-significant differences that aren't practically actionable.

Sugano is the Rockies' best arm — but this is the same staff with the WORST ERA in baseball. Attack the bullpen early and often.

Cubs lead the series 2-0. Let's finish it.

Javier Assad starts Game 1. Cubs sit at 35-34, hunting a wild card spot. SF has been one of MLB's worst teams all season.

Cubs were in 1st in the NL Central three weeks ago.

They're 29-26 now — 3rd — with the Brewers (31-20+) holding a 4+ game lead and the Cardinals sitting between them. Ten games will do that.

They are now 29-26 — 8-22 since that peak. No blockbuster trade, no lineup overhaul. Just the same roster and a 10-game slide that makes no statistical sense.

bottom_performers.text:
The Brewers are 41-25. The division is gone.

Cubs sit at 37-35 and locked into the wild card race. Not a concession — a pivot.

Division rivals are crowding the hunt. Every win vs. a basement team matters. Three against Colorado starts tonight.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB

Pete Crow-Armstrong hit for the CYCLE. Cubs walk off the Rockies 5-4.

First REVERSE cycle in Cubs franchise history — HR, triple, double, single. The 13th cycle overall.

4-for-4, 2 RBI, 19-game on-base streak. This is what a franchise player looks like.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

Milwaukee just swept the Cardinals and is 14-4 in their last 18.

The Brewers are 4 games up on the Cubs in the NL Central — and they're RUNNING. One win after a 10-game skid isn't enough. The Cubs need a sustained run, and they need it now.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB

Two 10-game win streaks. One 10-game skid. All in the same season.

The 2026 Cubs just joined the 2017 Dodgers as the ONLY teams in MLB history to pull that off.

That's this team. Maddening, electric, and completely unlike anything else.

#Cubs #ChicagoCubs #MLB

Cubs 7, Pirates 2. Happ 2-run HR, Suzuki 2 hits and 2 RBI. The Cubs handed Skenes his 3rd straight loss and split the Pittsburgh series.

Skenes fanned 10 in 5.1 IP but 2 Pittsburgh errors in the 6th gifted a 3-0 lead. Cubs leave Pittsburgh at 31-26. 🔥

#Cubs #FlyTheW #GoCubs
